NAVAREA XIX 75/19

1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 310630 UTC JUL 2019
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N. EAST OF 5W

66-30.0N - 008-56.2E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
66-02.9N - 008-22.4E TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC
65-55.9N - 007-32.8E SCARABEO 8
65-50.7N - 007-22.6E WEST PHOENIX
65-12.2N - 006-22.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN
65-01.2N - 006-52.5E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 73/19
